summary.en: A hyperlocal marketplace digitizing Indonesia's traditional wet markets so households can shop multiple merchants in one order.
summary.zh: 將印尼傳統傳統市場數位化的超本地市集，讓家庭在一筆訂單中向多家攤商採購。

highlight.en: Titipku puts a personal shopper layer over neighborhood wet markets, targeting Indonesia's 16,000 markets and 8 million merchants.
highlight.zh: Titipku 在社區傳統市場上加入代購服務，鎖定印尼 16,000 個市場與 800 萬名攤商。

summary.en: A no-code tool that lets any local business set up an online store and sell anything without design or app downloads.
summary.zh: 讓任何本地商家無需設計或下載 App，就能架設線上商店販售任何商品的無程式碼工具。

highlight.en: Cococart targets the 200 million businesses still taking orders by WhatsApp or phone, giving them a website with no learning curve.
highlight.zh: Cococart 鎖定仍靠 WhatsApp 或電話接單的 2 億家商戶，提供無學習門檻的網站。

summary.en: A platform for finance teams to build, run, and automate their workflows using Python and AI.
summary.zh: 讓財務團隊運用 Python 與 AI 建立、執行並自動化工作流程的平台。

highlight.en: Abstra turns finance processes like reporting, reconciliations, and approvals into versioned, auditable code that connects to tools like SAP.
highlight.zh: Abstra 將報表、對帳、審批等財務流程轉為可版本控管、可稽核的程式碼，並串接 SAP 等系統。

summary.en: A modern checkout platform built for D2C brands and shoppers across Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 為東南亞 D2C 品牌與消費者打造的現代結帳平台。

highlight.en: Arrow gives shoppers a mobile-first checkout with preferred local payment methods and no repeated account setup, redirects, or new passwords.
highlight.zh: Arrow 提供以行動裝置為主的結帳體驗，支援偏好的本地支付方式，免去重複註冊、多次跳轉與設定新密碼。

summary.en: An AI personal finance app with credit-building, budgeting, and spend-tracking tools aimed at young adults.
summary.zh: 結合信用養成、預算規劃與消費追蹤工具、鎖定年輕族群的 AI 個人理財 App。

highlight.en: Mine pairs its credit-builder with MoneyGPT, a money assistant, to give young adults more control over their financial decisions.
highlight.zh: Mine 將信用養成工具與理財助理 MoneyGPT 結合，讓年輕人更能掌控自己的財務決策。

summary.en: A central compliance hub that helps firms meet SEC obligations across Code of Ethics, marketing, filings, and more.
summary.zh: 協助企業在道德準則、行銷、申報等面向滿足 SEC 法遵義務的集中式法遵平台。

highlight.en: Aer is positioned as Rippling for compliance, consolidating Code of Ethics, calendars, filings, and workflows into one place.
highlight.zh: Aer 定位為「法遵界的 Rippling」，將道德準則、行事曆、申報與工作流程整合於單一平台。

summary.en: ChitChat by Union54 is an integrated messaging and payments wallet built for Africa's needs.
summary.zh: Union54 推出的 ChitChat 是專為非洲需求打造的整合式通訊與支付錢包。

highlight.en: ChitChat combines secure messaging with USD cards and cross-border payments to cut the high remittance fees African senders typically pay.
highlight.zh: ChitChat 結合安全通訊、美元卡與跨境支付，降低非洲匯款人通常負擔的高昂跨境匯費。

summary.en: Latin America's first investing social network where users can learn, share, and invest in US markets.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲首個投資社群網路，讓使用者學習、分享並投資美國市場。

highlight.en: Sproutfi lets Latin Americans invest in thousands of US stocks and ETFs from as little as $1, with no account minimums or fees.
highlight.zh: Sproutfi 讓拉丁美洲用戶以低至 1 美元投資數千檔美股與 ETF，無最低開戶金額、零手續費。

summary.en: An income verification service for Latin America, like The Work Number for the region.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造的收入驗證服務，相當於該地區的 The Work Number。

highlight.en: Buró de Ingresos makes it easy for consumers and businesses to share income information with financial institutions.
highlight.zh: Buró de Ingresos 讓消費者與企業能輕鬆向金融機構分享收入資訊。

summary.en: A low-cost, high-scale EV charging platform built for apartment buildings and beyond.
summary.zh: 為公寓大樓及其他場域打造的低成本、可大規模部署電動車充電平台。

highlight.en: HeyCharge's plug-and-play chargers work without internet and integrate with third-party products via its SDK and APIs.
highlight.zh: HeyCharge 的隨插即用充電器無需網路連線，並透過 SDK 與 API 與第三方產品整合。

summary.en: A B2B payments platform that helps businesses accept and reconcile payments seamlessly.
summary.zh: 協助企業無縫收款與對帳的 B2B 支付平台。

highlight.en: Slope focuses on streamlining the accept-and-reconcile cycle of B2B payments in one platform.
highlight.zh: Slope 專注於在單一平台上簡化 B2B 支付的收款與對帳流程。

summary.en: A unified chat app that connects 15+ messaging networks with unified search and advanced filtering.
summary.zh: 整合 15 種以上通訊網路、具備統一搜尋與進階篩選的單一聊天 App。

highlight.en: Beeper aims to end messaging fragmentation across Desktop, Android, iPhone, and iPad, including pain points like joining iMessage groups from Android.
highlight.zh: Beeper 力求消除跨桌機、Android、iPhone 與 iPad 的通訊碎片化，包括從 Android 加入 iMessage 群組等痛點。

summary.en: A drug-discovery platform targeting the previously undruggable DNA regulome inside live human cells.
summary.zh: 在活體人類細胞中鎖定過去無法成藥之 DNA 調控組的藥物探索平台。

highlight.en: Talus combines automated cell processing, next-gen proteomics, and analytics to measure a drug's effect on the entire regulome in one experiment.
highlight.zh: Talus 結合自動化細胞處理、新一代蛋白質體學與分析，於單次實驗中量測藥物對整個調控組的影響。

summary.en: A no-code data infrastructure and tech stack for biotechs, combining ELN, LIMS, integrations, and analytics.
summary.zh: 為生技公司打造的無程式碼資料基礎設施與技術堆疊，整合 ELN、LIMS、整合與分析功能。

highlight.en: Scispot lets biotech teams design data infrastructure, automate workflows, and make data ML-ready via GUI or CLI, with ready-made experiment blueprints.
highlight.zh: Scispot 讓生技團隊透過 GUI 或 CLI 設計資料基礎設施、自動化流程並使資料就緒於機器學習，並提供現成實驗範本。

summary.en: A biotech diversifying precision cancer diagnostics and treatments by sequencing samples from across Africa.
summary.zh: 透過定序來自非洲各地的樣本，使精準癌症診斷與治療更具多樣性的生技公司。

highlight.en: Yemaachi leverages Africa's status as the world's most genetically diverse population to build a first-of-its-kind cancer knowledgebase.
highlight.zh: Yemaachi 善用非洲作為全球基因最多樣化族群的優勢，建立首創的癌症臨床與分子知識庫。

summary.en: An AI copilot that gives teams immediate access to customer insights and strategy.
summary.zh: 讓團隊即時取得顧客洞察與策略的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: CoLoop aims to make every company as customer-obsessed as Amazon by giving workers intuitive access to customer knowledge for faster decisions.
highlight.zh: CoLoop 力求讓每家公司都像 Amazon 一樣以顧客為中心，提供工作者直覺取用顧客知識以加速決策。

summary.en: Superwall lets teams remotely configure every aspect of their mobile app's paywall.
summary.zh: Superwall 讓團隊遠端設定行動 App 付費牆的各個環節。

highlight.en: Superwall focuses on paywall configuration, letting mobile teams change and test paywalls remotely without shipping app updates.
highlight.zh: Superwall 專注於付費牆設定，讓行動團隊無需發布 App 更新即可遠端修改與測試付費牆。

summary.en: An all-in-one AI video agent that produces short-form videos like TikToks, Reels, and ads instantly.
summary.zh: 一站式 AI 影片代理，即時製作 TikTok、Reels 與廣告等短影音。

highlight.en: Affogato lets businesses, sellers, and creators type an idea and get campaign-ready short-form videos in minutes with no editing skills.
highlight.zh: Affogato 讓企業、賣家與創作者輸入點子，數分鐘內產出可上線的短影音，無需剪輯技能。

summary.en: AI-native mobile app testing that automates end-to-end coverage with its GPT Driver.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心的行動 App 測試，透過 GPT Driver 自動化端對端測試覆蓋。

highlight.en: MobileBoost's GPT Driver cuts tedious test maintenance and is used by Duolingo, Spotify, Netflix, Salesforce, and Groupon.
highlight.zh: MobileBoost 的 GPT Driver 減少繁瑣的測試維護，獲 Duolingo、Spotify、Netflix、Salesforce 與 Groupon 採用。

summary.en: A financial platform built for migrant families living in America.
summary.zh: 為在美國生活的移民家庭打造的金融平台。

highlight.en: InstaKin focuses specifically on the financial needs of migrant families in the US rather than a general consumer audience.
highlight.zh: InstaKin 專注於美國移民家庭的金融需求，而非一般大眾消費者。

summary.en: Software that helps employees understand and pick the right employee benefits.
summary.zh: 協助員工理解並挑選合適員工福利的軟體。

highlight.en: Brite lets benefits brokerages build digital benefit guides that drive enrollment, positioning itself as the Employee Navigator of benefits education.
highlight.zh: Brite 讓福利仲介製作數位福利指南以提升投保率，定位為福利教育軟體界的 Employee Navigator。

summary.en: A platform that uses LLMs to buy, track, and manage building materials for construction companies.
summary.zh: 運用大型語言模型為營造公司採購、追蹤與管理建材的平台。

highlight.en: DigiBuild targets the top cause of late, over-budget projects, helping contractors source and track materials from supplier to job site.
highlight.zh: DigiBuild 鎖定工程延誤與超支的首要原因，協助承包商從供應商到工地採購並追蹤建材。

summary.en: A tool for meeting agendas, notes, and goals that tie back to your OKRs.
summary.zh: 將會議議程、筆記與目標串連回 OKR 的工具。

highlight.en: Hypercontext runs 1:1s, team meetings, and OKRs in one workflow and is trusted by managers at Netflix, LinkedIn, and Facebook.
highlight.zh: Hypercontext 在單一流程中運作一對一、團隊會議與 OKR，獲 Netflix、LinkedIn 與 Facebook 的主管採用。

summary.en: Automated end-to-end screenshot testing for web apps without writing or maintaining tests.
summary.zh: 為網頁應用提供自動化端對端截圖測試，無需撰寫或維護測試。

highlight.en: Meticulous records real user sessions via a JS snippet, replays relevant ones on pull requests, and posts visual diffs for inspection.
highlight.zh: Meticulous 透過 JS 程式碼片段錄製真實使用者操作，在 PR 時重播相關操作並貼出視覺差異供檢視。

summary.en: An on-demand wage access service built for the African market.
summary.zh: 為非洲市場打造的隨需薪資提領服務。

highlight.en: Floatpays bundles earned-wage access with financial education, budgeting, and vouchers to address that most South Africans run out of money mid-month.
highlight.zh: Floatpays 將已賺取薪資提領與財務教育、預算規劃及消費券結合，解決多數南非人月中即用罄薪水的問題。

summary.en: A no-code platform for building flexible business apps with native data, logic, and automation.
summary.zh: 用於打造彈性商業應用、具備原生資料、邏輯與自動化的無程式碼平台。

highlight.en: Noloco empowers ops teams to build the tools their business needs, adding logic, automation, and AI without code.
highlight.zh: Noloco 讓營運團隊能自行打造業務所需工具，無需程式碼即可加入邏輯、自動化與 AI。

summary.en: A DNA App Store where users upload Ancestry or 23andMe data to unlock a range of genetic insights.
summary.zh: DNA 應用商店，讓使用者上傳 Ancestry 或 23andMe 資料以解鎖各種基因洞察。

highlight.en: Genomelink offers ancestry breakdowns, ancient DNA insights, and 350+ trait analyses, aiming to be the default hub for consumer genomics apps.
highlight.zh: Genomelink 提供血統分析、古代 DNA 洞察與 350 多項特徵分析，志在成為消費者基因應用的預設樞紐。

summary.en: A security delivery platform that orchestrates AI agents for service providers and security teams.
summary.zh: 為服務供應商與資安團隊調度 AI 代理的資安交付平台。

highlight.en: ContraForce orchestrates supervised or autonomous AI agents to run triage, investigation, response, and documentation at scale across multiple tenants.
highlight.zh: ContraForce 調度受監督或自主的 AI 代理，跨多租戶大規模執行分類、調查、回應與文件記錄。

summary.en: A spacecraft company moving objects around in space and imaging space objects when it isn't.
summary.zh: 在太空中移動物體、其餘時間則為太空物體成像的太空船公司。

highlight.en: Founded by SpaceX alumni, Turion sells space domain awareness imagery while advancing toward orbital debris removal and eventual asteroid mining.
highlight.zh: Turion 由 SpaceX 前員工創立，銷售太空態勢感知影像，同時邁向軌道碎片清除與最終的小行星採礦。

summary.en: A platform to manage sales commissions and boost sales performance for B2B companies.
summary.zh: 為 B2B 企業管理銷售佣金並提升銷售績效的平台。

highlight.en: PaletteHQ connects to a company's CRM, accounting, or ERP to calculate commissions automatically, replacing Excel spreadsheets and BI tools.
highlight.zh: PaletteHQ 串接公司的 CRM、會計或 ERP 自動計算佣金，取代 Excel 試算表與 BI 工具。

summary.en: Programmatic building blocks for transacting with insurance, like Plaid but for insurance.
summary.zh: 用於與保險業交易的程式化基礎元件，宛如保險業的 Plaid。

highlight.en: Covie offers a carrier-neutral API for policy access and monitoring, serving verification, financial advising, compliance, and distribution use cases.
highlight.zh: Covie 提供保險公司中立的 API 進行保單存取與監控，服務於核保查驗、財務諮詢、法遵與通路等情境。

summary.en: A single integration for global payments, described as Segment for payments.
summary.zh: 全球支付的單一整合方案，被形容為支付界的 Segment。

highlight.en: inai gives merchants one integration and a no-code dashboard to connect gateways, wallets, and BNPL, and switch providers while keeping their data.
highlight.zh: inai 讓商家透過單一整合與無程式碼儀表板串接各支付閘道、錢包與 BNPL，並能保留資料下切換服務商。

summary.en: Native user-facing SaaS integrations that developers can embed into their product with minimal work.
summary.zh: 讓開發者以最少工作量嵌入產品的原生面向使用者 SaaS 整合服務。

highlight.en: hotglue lets developers stay in control of customer data, with a configurable Python-powered transformation layer to shape incoming data.
highlight.zh: hotglue 讓開發者掌控顧客資料，並透過可設定的 Python 轉換層調整匯入的資料。

summary.en: An online coding and math school for kids aged 8 to 16.
summary.zh: 為 8 至 16 歲兒童打造的線上程式設計與數學學校。

highlight.en: Strive makes coding and math joyful, aiming to redefine STEM education globally by teaching subjects like math and science through coding.
highlight.zh: Strive 讓程式設計與數學變得有趣，志在透過程式設計教授數學、科學等科目以重塑全球 STEM 教育。

summary.en: A salary-on-demand platform that lets employees access earned wages in Latin America.
summary.zh: 讓拉丁美洲員工提領已賺取薪資的隨需薪資平台。

highlight.en: Through Monto, employees of affiliated companies can access their earned wages on-demand for a low fixed fee.
highlight.zh: 透過 Monto，合作企業的員工能以低額固定費用隨需提領已賺取的薪資。

summary.en: Liquid cooling solutions for data centers, inspired by nuclear reactor cooling.
summary.zh: 受核反應爐冷卻啟發、為資料中心打造的液冷解決方案。

highlight.en: Ferveret says its technology cuts data center cooling costs by 96% and capital costs by 68% while doubling chip performance.
highlight.zh: Ferveret 表示其技術能將資料中心冷卻成本降低 96%、資本成本降低 68%，同時使晶片效能翻倍。

summary.en: AI-powered ERP, MES, and test software for complex engineering, manufacturing, and operations.
summary.zh: 為複雜工程、製造與營運打造的 AI 驅動 ERP、MES 與測試軟體。

highlight.en: Built by engineers from SpaceX, NASA, and Google with experience on 100+ space missions, Epsilon3 serves aerospace, energy, defense, and biotech.
highlight.zh: Epsilon3 由具備 100 多項太空任務經驗的 SpaceX、NASA 與 Google 工程師打造，服務航太、能源、國防與生技領域。

summary.en: An app offering on-demand professional workspaces, paid by the minute.
summary.zh: 提供隨需專業辦公空間、按分鐘計費的 App。

highlight.en: Deskimo connects hybrid workers to quality workspaces across Singapore, Indonesia, Malaysia, Hong Kong, and the UAE with one-tap QR check-in.
highlight.zh: Deskimo 以一鍵 QR 碼簽到，連結混合辦公人力與新加坡、印尼、馬來西亞、香港及阿聯的優質辦公空間。

summary.en: A platform that turns static docs into instant answers via searchable knowledge portals.
summary.zh: 透過可搜尋的知識入口，將靜態文件轉為即時答案的平台。

highlight.en: Archbee helps teams build knowledge portals that are easy to navigate, search, share, and contribute to.
highlight.zh: Archbee 協助團隊建立易於瀏覽、搜尋、分享與貢獻的知識入口。

summary.en: A multicurrency account and international payments platform for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的多幣別帳戶與國際支付平台。

highlight.en: Levro lets companies hold, convert, and pay in 30+ currencies at rates it says are 40-90% lower than banks and services like Wise.
highlight.zh: Levro 讓企業持有、兌換並支付 30 多種貨幣，匯率號稱比銀行及 Wise 等服務低 40 至 90%。

summary.en: A speech and accent coaching app for non-native English speakers.
summary.zh: 為非母語英語使用者打造的口語與口音訓練 App。

highlight.en: BoldVoice combines bite-sized video lessons from Hollywood accent coaches with instant AI pronunciation feedback.
highlight.zh: BoldVoice 將好萊塢口音教練的短片課程與即時 AI 發音回饋結合。

summary.en: A marketing agency for startups that delivers ad campaigns 10x cheaper, better, and faster.
summary.zh: 為新創打造的行銷代理商，廣告投放號稱便宜、更好且更快 10 倍。

highlight.en: Kaya combines technology with experienced marketers and says it has helped 120+ businesses grow their ad campaigns within its first year.
highlight.zh: Kaya 結合技術與資深行銷人員，表示在創立首年已協助 120 多家企業擴大廣告投放成效。

summary.en: A personal AI gaming coach for PC gamers worldwide.
summary.zh: 為全球 PC 玩家打造的個人 AI 遊戲教練。

highlight.en: SenpAI.gg gives in-game recommendations and post-game feedback via a voice assistant and a computer-vision overlay to help gamers improve faster.
highlight.zh: SenpAI.gg 透過語音助理與電腦視覺疊加層提供遊戲中建議與賽後回饋，幫助玩家更快進步。

summary.en: An all-in-one banking and payment automation platform for construction businesses.
summary.zh: 為營造業打造的一站式銀行與支付自動化平台。

highlight.en: Truss lets construction companies manage bill payments, receivables, and corporate cards in one place while automating the full billing cycle.
highlight.zh: Truss 讓營造公司在單一平台管理帳單支付、應收款與企業卡，並自動化整個請款週期。

summary.en: AI that understands and automates the physical world.
summary.zh: 理解並自動化實體世界的 AI。

highlight.en: Zensors focuses on applying AI to interpret and act on what happens in physical, real-world environments.
highlight.zh: Zensors 專注於運用 AI 解讀實體真實環境中發生的情況並據以行動。

summary.en: Affordable, verified direct air carbon capture and storage that permanently removes atmospheric CO2.
summary.zh: 可負擔且經驗證的直接空氣碳捕集與封存，永久移除大氣中的二氧化碳。

highlight.en: Heimdal's first deployment, Bantam, is described as the largest DAC facility in the US with the lowest cost per ton anywhere in the world.
highlight.zh: Heimdal 的首座設施 Bantam 號稱是美國最大的直接空氣捕集設施，每噸成本為全球最低。

summary.en: Automated data observability and quality monitoring for data lakes and open architectures.
summary.zh: 為資料湖與開放架構提供自動化資料可觀測性與品質監控。

highlight.en: Telmai monitors data in any system in its raw format at scale without sampling, designed for open data architecture.
highlight.zh: Telmai 以原始格式大規模監控任何系統中的資料且無需抽樣，專為開放資料架構設計。

summary.en: An operating system for restaurants, focused on Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 為餐廳打造、聚焦東南亞的營運作業系統。

highlight.en: Atlas is built by the team behind Grain, a venture-backed online restaurant they grew to millions in revenue, to help any restaurant run online and offline.
highlight.zh: Atlas 由打造創投支持線上餐廳 Grain（營收達數百萬美元）的團隊開發，協助任何餐廳線上線下經營。

summary.en: Autonomous medical care delivery, starting with psychiatry.
summary.zh: 自主醫療照護服務，從精神科起步。

highlight.en: Legion says it automates 95% of administrative work and was the first company authorized to let AI prescribe psychiatric medications.
highlight.zh: Legion 表示其自動化了 95% 的行政工作，並為首家獲准讓 AI 開立精神科藥物的公司。

summary.en: Vertical takeoff and landing aircraft built for major airlines.
summary.zh: 為大型航空公司打造的垂直起降飛機。

highlight.en: Odys cuts travel time in half on busy routes using helipads and local airports, has won two USAF Agility Prime contracts, and holds 1,000+ aircraft pre-orders.
highlight.zh: Odys 利用直升機坪與地方機場將繁忙航線旅行時間減半，已贏得兩項美國空軍 Agility Prime 合約並有逾 1,000 架飛機預訂。

summary.en: A coordination platform for software teams where people and AI agents work side by side.
summary.zh: 讓人與 AI 代理並肩協作的軟體團隊協調平台。

highlight.en: Dailybot runs async standups, retros, and workflows inside Slack, Teams, Google Chat, and Discord, now letting AI agents report progress and surface blockers.
highlight.zh: Dailybot 在 Slack、Teams、Google Chat 與 Discord 中執行非同步站立會、回顧與工作流程，現也讓 AI 代理回報進度並點出阻礙。

summary.en: Organic, gourmet high-protein meals designed for longevity.
summary.zh: 為延年益壽設計的有機美食高蛋白餐點。

highlight.en: Locale meals offer 40-60g protein, no seed oils, and organic produce, served in reusable glass jars, with 100K+ orders delivered since 2020.
highlight.zh: Locale 餐點提供 40 至 60 克蛋白質、不含種子油與有機食材，盛裝於可重複使用玻璃罐，自 2020 年起已配送逾 10 萬筆訂單。

summary.en: Modern back office software and services for launching and operating hedge funds.
summary.zh: 為避險基金的成立與營運打造的現代化後勤軟體與服務。

highlight.en: Repool is positioned as Carta or Juniper for hedge funds, simplifying launch, fund administration, and LP onboarding.
highlight.zh: Repool 定位為避險基金界的 Carta 或 Juniper，簡化基金成立、行政管理與有限合夥人引導流程。

summary.en: A lender providing loans to Nigeria's small businesses in under three hours.
summary.zh: 在三小時內向奈及利亞小型企業放貸的貸款業者。

highlight.en: Payhippo reported $42k revenue in Nigeria in July 2021, growing 25% month over month with a 97% repayment rate.
highlight.zh: Payhippo 表示 2021 年 7 月在奈及利亞營收達 4.2 萬美元，月增 25%，還款率達 97%。

summary.en: A versatile visual intelligence platform that answers questions about video at scale.
summary.zh: 可大規模回答影片相關問題的多功能視覺智慧平台。

highlight.en: A Cambridge spin-out, Tenyks applies multimodal Vision-Language Models for video summarization, retrieval, and visual question-answering.
highlight.zh: Tenyks 為劍橋大學衍生公司，運用多模態視覺語言模型進行影片摘要、檢索與視覺問答。

summary.en: A pay-by-bank service that lets shoppers pay directly from their bank and earn rewards.
summary.zh: 讓消費者直接從銀行帳戶付款並賺取回饋的銀行支付服務。

highlight.en: Zage aims to make the exchange of value seamless, offering rewards on top of direct bank payments.
highlight.zh: Zage 力求讓價值交換無縫順暢，並在銀行直接付款之外提供回饋。

summary.en: A social commerce app for India that lets customers buy together in groups for better deals.
summary.zh: 為印度打造的社交電商 App，讓顧客組團共購以取得更優惠價格。

highlight.en: Gobillion is positioned as the Pinduoduo for India, making e-commerce social through group buying.
highlight.zh: Gobillion 定位為印度版拼多多，透過團購使電商社交化。

summary.en: Near-space flying machines that replace satellites for high-resolution reconnaissance.
summary.zh: 取代衛星進行高解析度偵察的近太空飛行器。

highlight.en: Kalam Labs' UAVs, deployed from high-altitude balloons, provide high-res EO/IR and hyperspectral reconnaissance as a satellite alternative.
highlight.zh: Kalam Labs 的無人機由高空氣球部署，提供高解析度 EO/IR 與高光譜偵察，作為衛星的替代方案。

summary.en: A battery observability platform for electric vehicles.
summary.zh: 為電動車打造的電池可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Coulomb AI uses predictive analytics, real-time monitoring, and adaptive management algorithms to improve battery lifespan and performance.
highlight.zh: Coulomb AI 運用預測分析、即時監控與自適應管理演算法，提升電池壽命與效能。

summary.en: A job-driven virtual tech university for India training students through live cohorts.
summary.zh: 以就業為導向、透過即時班級培訓學生的印度虛擬科技大學。

highlight.en: AlgoUniversity has top educators from Google and Facebook coach students in year-long cohorts, charging fees via an income-sharing agreement after they land tech jobs.
highlight.zh: AlgoUniversity 由來自 Google 與 Facebook 的頂尖教育者於年度班級授課，學生取得科技工作後以收入分潤協議支付學費。

summary.en: An all-in-one digital ordering system that helps restaurants go direct-to-consumer.
summary.zh: 協助餐廳直接面對消費者的一站式數位點餐系統。

highlight.en: Tablevibe connects to Uber, DoorDash, Grab, and Foodpanda for low distance-based delivery rates, saving restaurants up to 80% on delivery costs.
highlight.zh: Tablevibe 串接 Uber、DoorDash、Grab 與 Foodpanda 以取得依距離計費的低外送費率，為餐廳省下最多 80% 外送成本。

summary.en: A fast, efficient trading terminal built for crypto traders.
summary.zh: 為加密貨幣交易者打造的快速、高效交易終端。

highlight.en: HyperTrader streamlines the trading workflow with fewer clicks, fast execution, real-time position updates, and secure encryption.
highlight.zh: HyperTrader 以更少點擊、快速執行、即時部位更新與安全加密簡化交易流程。

summary.en: A data pipeline custom-built for security teams and their security data lake.
summary.zh: 專為資安團隊與其資安資料湖客製打造的資料管線。

highlight.en: As security data grows 25% year over year, Tarsal bridges the modern data stack and security teams to pioneer the modern security data stack.
highlight.zh: 在資安資料每年成長 25% 之際，Tarsal 銜接現代資料堆疊與資安團隊，開創現代資安資料堆疊。

summary.en: AI-driven technology and space optimization that helps restaurants scale to multiple locations.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的技術與空間優化，協助餐廳擴展至多個據點。

highlight.en: Described as Airbnb for restaurants, OneStopKitchen runs kitchens in underused prime spaces and lets diners mix multiple cuisines in one order.
highlight.zh: OneStopKitchen 被形容為餐廳界的 Airbnb，在閒置的精華空間經營廚房，並讓食客在單筆訂單中混搭多種菜系。

summary.en: Automated communication between hospitals and patients in Latin America over WhatsApp.
summary.zh: 透過 WhatsApp 自動處理拉丁美洲醫院與病患溝通的服務。

highlight.en: Cero tackles the nearly half of Latin American appointments missed by no-shows, letting patients confirm or reschedule via WhatsApp without calling.
highlight.zh: Cero 針對拉丁美洲近半因爽約而錯失的看診，讓病患透過 WhatsApp 確認或改期而無需致電。

summary.en: Internet-connected bed sensors that help nursing home staff be 30% more effective.
summary.zh: 協助安養院人員提升 30% 效率的聯網床墊感測器。

highlight.en: Momo Medical's bed sensors give nurses resident insights, reducing falls and bedsores while improving evening and night shift productivity by over 30%.
highlight.zh: Momo Medical 的床墊感測器為護理人員提供住民洞察，減少跌倒與褥瘡，並使晚班與夜班生產力提升逾 30%。

summary.en: AI-driven mobile cybersecurity that detects and blocks spyware on devices.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動、能在裝置上偵測並封鎖間諜軟體的行動資安服務。

highlight.en: Malloc uses on-device AI to detect zero-click spyware and abnormal activity in real time, selling to individuals, enterprises, and governments.
highlight.zh: Malloc 運用裝置端 AI 即時偵測零點擊間諜軟體與異常活動，銷售對象涵蓋個人、企業與政府。

summary.en: A tool for developers to build frictionless signup flows in minutes.
summary.zh: 讓開發者在數分鐘內建立無摩擦註冊流程的工具。

highlight.en: Arengu gives companies the optimized signup flows that giants like Airbnb and Uber build with full engineering teams, boosting conversion by 20-30%.
highlight.zh: Arengu 讓企業擁有如 Airbnb、Uber 靠整支工程團隊打造的優化註冊流程，提升轉換率 20 至 30%。

summary.en: Cohort-based online courses for professionals across Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲專業人士打造的班級制線上課程。

highlight.en: Kurios reports a 90% completion rate and 100% annual retention, up-skilling employees at firms like Walmart Mexico, Mercado Libre, and BCP.
highlight.zh: Kurios 表示課程完成率達 90%、年度留存率達 100%，為 Walmart Mexico、Mercado Libre 與 BCP 等企業員工提升技能。

summary.en: Developer-friendly drop-in payouts infrastructure delivered via API.
summary.zh: 透過 API 提供、開發者友善的隨插即用支付出款基礎設施。

highlight.en: Dots lets businesses pay contractors in a few lines of code, handling KYC, payouts across ACH, Venmo, CashApp, Zelle, and international, plus tax forms.
highlight.zh: Dots 讓企業以數行程式碼支付承包商，並處理 KYC、ACH、Venmo、CashApp、Zelle 與跨境出款及報稅表。

summary.en: A tool to plan and review AI-generated code.
summary.zh: 用於規劃與審查 AI 產生程式碼的工具。

highlight.en: Vibe Kanban integrates with leading coding agents like Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex to help developers plan and review what they produce.
highlight.zh: Vibe Kanban 與 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 及 OpenAI 的 Codex 等頂尖編碼代理整合，協助開發者規劃並審查其產出。

summary.en: Patent-pending enzymes that break down common dietary triggers for people with digestive issues.
summary.zh: 為消化問題者打造、能分解常見飲食誘因的專利申請中酵素。

highlight.en: Kiwi Biosciences develops enzymes to help the 18M Americans with IBS enjoy normal meals without later digestive distress.
highlight.zh: Kiwi Biosciences 開發酵素，協助 1,800 萬名罹患腸躁症的美國人正常用餐而不致事後消化不適。

summary.en: AI-powered application control for Windows and macOS.
summary.zh: 為 Windows 與 macOS 打造的 AI 驅動應用程式控管。

highlight.en: idemeum's AI agents analyze every application execution on Windows and macOS, letting admins decide exactly what is allowed to run.
highlight.zh: idemeum 的 AI 代理分析 Windows 與 macOS 上的每次應用程式執行，讓管理者精準決定允許執行的項目。

summary.en: Pakistan's first financial wellness platform offering early wage access.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦首個提供薪資提早提領的財務健康平台。

highlight.en: Abhi lets salaried employees draw down accrued pay before payday via a B2B2C model, helping them avoid late fees and expensive debt.
highlight.zh: Abhi 以 B2B2C 模式讓受薪員工在發薪日前提領已累積薪資，協助避免逾期費用與高息借貸。

summary.en: A tool to list items across multiple resale marketplaces at once.
summary.zh: 可一次將商品上架至多個二手轉售市集的工具。

highlight.en: OneShop focuses on cross-listing, letting resellers publish their items to multiple resale marketplaces from a single place.
highlight.zh: OneShop 專注於跨平台上架，讓轉售者從單一介面將商品同時刊登至多個二手市集。

summary.en: A workplace engagement hub for discovering people, meeting in person, and organizing internal events.
summary.zh: 用於認識同事、面對面相聚與籌辦內部活動的職場互動樞紐。

highlight.en: Café brings discovery, in-person meetups, and internal event organization into one place to boost connection, engagement, and attendance.
highlight.zh: Café 將人脈探索、面對面聚會與內部活動籌辦整合於一處，以提升連結、參與度與出席率。

summary.en: A marketplace for 1:1 business and career advice from leaders of top companies.
summary.zh: 提供頂尖企業領袖一對一商業與職涯建議的媒合平台。

highlight.en: Mentorcam connects people seeking guidance with mentors who are leaders of the world's best companies for 1:1 sessions.
highlight.zh: Mentorcam 將尋求指引的人與世界頂尖企業領袖媒合，進行一對一輔導。

summary.en: A platform that scales data and CI pipelines for enterprises by managing Argo Workflows.
summary.zh: 透過管理 Argo Workflows 為企業擴展資料與 CI 管線的平台。

highlight.en: Pipekit maintains Argo Workflows, the open-source Kubernetes pipeline framework used in production by Bloomberg, Intuit, Adobe, and NVIDIA.
highlight.zh: Pipekit 維護 Argo Workflows，這套開源 Kubernetes 管線框架已由 Bloomberg、Intuit、Adobe 與 NVIDIA 投入生產環境使用。

summary.en: AI business analysts that gather requirements and optimize processes.
summary.zh: 蒐集需求並優化流程的 AI 商業分析師。

highlight.en: Varos' AI agent Arthur runs voice or text interviews with teams in any language to capture institutional knowledge and turn it into a secure knowledge base.
highlight.zh: Varos 的 AI 代理 Arthur 以任何語言對團隊進行語音或文字訪談，擷取組織知識並轉化為安全的知識庫。

summary.en: A no-code platform for creating custom business tools and workflows.
summary.zh: 用於建立客製化商業工具與工作流程的無程式碼平台。

highlight.en: Jestor lets non-developers build custom workflows, Kanban boards, tables, apps, forms, and dashboards in a few clicks, using AI to cut manual work.
highlight.zh: Jestor 讓非開發者以數次點擊建立客製工作流程、看板、表格、應用、表單與儀表板，並運用 AI 減少手動作業。

summary.en: An AI-native platform for building and editing internal apps and agents through vibe-coding.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心、透過氛圍編碼建立與編輯內部應用與代理的平台。

highlight.en: Positioned as Lovable for internal products, Zaz OS uses spec-driven development to ensure consistency and security for critical company processes.
highlight.zh: Zaz OS 定位為內部產品界的 Lovable，採用規格驅動開發，確保關鍵公司流程的一致性與安全性。

summary.en: A platform for guiding cardiac therapeutics entirely from your phone.
summary.zh: 完全透過手機指引心臟治療的平台。

highlight.en: SafeBeat aims to guide cardiac therapeutics directly from a patient's phone rather than requiring in-clinic management.
highlight.zh: SafeBeat 力求直接從病患手機指引心臟治療，而非仰賴診間管理。

summary.en: A disk-shaped injection device designed to make injections as easy as pushing a button.
summary.zh: 圓盤狀注射裝置，讓注射如按下按鈕般簡單。

highlight.en: Pirouette's patented, low-profile device is built from patient input around affordability, portability, and usability, requiring little or no training.
highlight.zh: Pirouette 的專利薄型裝置依病患意見打造，主打可負擔、便攜與易用，幾乎無需訓練即可操作。

summary.en: A company making electric vehicle batteries affordable through a battery-swapping network in India.
summary.zh: 透過印度的電池更換網路使電動車電池變得可負擔的公司。

highlight.en: Enerjazz builds a gas-station-like battery swapping network for India's 2M+ commercial EVs, helping owners earn 80% more.
highlight.zh: Enerjazz 為印度逾 200 萬輛商用電動車打造類似加油站的電池更換網路，協助車主增加 80% 收入。

summary.en: Affordable 1:1 ADHD coaching, 5-10x cheaper than alternatives.
summary.zh: 可負擔的一對一 ADHD 教練服務，較其他方案便宜 5 至 10 倍。

highlight.en: Built by ADHD coaches, psychiatrists, and doctors, Shimmer pairs members with a coach to co-design plans using methods developed with NYU, UC Berkeley, and UCSF.
highlight.zh: Shimmer 由 ADHD 教練、精神科醫師與醫師打造，搭配教練共同設計計畫，方法與紐約大學、加州大學柏克萊與舊金山分校合作研發。

summary.en: An app that lets you build and share apps with friends through prompting.
summary.zh: 讓你透過提示與朋友建立並分享應用的 App。

highlight.en: aSim follows a Prompt, Run, Remix, Repeat loop, letting users build and share apps with friends much like making a new social app.
highlight.zh: aSim 採用「提示、執行、混搭、重複」的循環，讓使用者與朋友建立並分享應用，宛如打造新的社群 App。

summary.en: A health program for Southeast Asia that helps people prevent and manage chronic diseases.
summary.zh: 協助人們預防與管理慢性病、為東南亞打造的健康計畫。

highlight.en: Positioned as Noom for Southeast Asia, Sirka pairs members with certified nutritionists via unlimited chat and personalized habit recommendations.
highlight.zh: Sirka 定位為東南亞版 Noom，透過無限制聊天與個人化習慣建議，為會員配對合格營養師。

summary.en: Advanced contract manufacturing of precision parts and metal assemblies for fast-moving hardware companies.
summary.zh: 為快速發展的硬體公司製造精密零件與金屬組件的先進代工服務。

highlight.en: RMFG runs software-defined factories that automate quoting, DFM, scheduling, and machine control, having shipped parts for robots, rockets, and PCB factories.
highlight.zh: RMFG 經營軟體定義工廠，自動化報價、DFM、排程與機台控制，已為機器人、火箭與 PCB 工廠交付零件。

summary.en: An operating system for insurance agencies.
summary.zh: 為保險代理機構打造的營運作業系統。

highlight.en: Infer focuses specifically on insurance agencies, providing an operating system to run their core operations.
highlight.zh: Infer 專注於保險代理機構，提供一套營運其核心業務的作業系統。

summary.en: A service that enables FMCG distributors in Africa to buy inventory on credit.
summary.zh: 讓非洲快消品經銷商以信用方式採購庫存的服務。

highlight.en: Via its Obtainly app, Suplias helps FMCG manufacturers receive payments and finance distributor inventory, growing revenue 32% month over month in Nigeria.
highlight.zh: Suplias 透過 Obtainly App 協助快消品製造商收款並為經銷商庫存提供融資，在奈及利亞營收月增 32%。
